# Glossary

Domain and infrastructure terms used across the codebase.

## Domain Terms

### Alias
A user-defined short name for a Claude Code session. Stored in `session-aliases.json`. Enables quick session recall by name instead of UUID.
- Files: [session-aliases](API-SURFACE.md#session-aliases), hooks/session-start

### Artifact
A file managed by ECC — agents, commands, skills, rules, hook descriptions. Tracked in the [manifest](#manifest).
- Files: [manifest](API-SURFACE.md#manifest), [detect](API-SURFACE.md#detect)

### Conflict / Merge Conflict
When an ECC-managed file differs between the source package and the user's `~/.claude/` directory during install. Resolved via [interactive review](#review-choice).
- Files: [merge](API-SURFACE.md#merge), [smart-merge](API-SURFACE.md#smart-merge)

### Detection
Scanning `~/.claude/` to discover existing agents, commands, skills, rules, and hooks before an install operation.
- Files: [detect](API-SURFACE.md#detect), [install-orchestrator](ARCHITECTURE.md)

### Manifest
JSON file (`.ecc-manifest.json`) tracking which artifacts ECC installed, their version, and installation timestamp. Used to identify ECC-managed vs user-custom files.
- Files: [manifest](API-SURFACE.md#manifest)

### Review Choice
User decision during interactive install: **accept** (overwrite with new), **keep** (preserve existing), or **smart-merge** (AI-assisted merge).
- Files: [merge](API-SURFACE.md#merge)

### Session
A Claude Code conversation transcript stored in `~/.claude/sessions/`. Has metadata (date, project, tasks, tools used) and can be aliased.
- Files: [session-manager](API-SURFACE.md#session-manager), [session-aliases](API-SURFACE.md#session-aliases)

### Skill
A markdown knowledge file that provides domain expertise to Claude Code. Located in `skills/<name>/SKILL.md`. Differs from agents (which have tools) and commands (which are user-invocable).
- Files: [detect](API-SURFACE.md#detect), skills/

## Infrastructure Terms

### Apply All
A batch decision during interactive install: when a user chooses `A`, `K`, or `M` (uppercase), that choice applies to all remaining files in the current category without prompting.
- Files: [merge](API-SURFACE.md#merge)

### Content Differ
Byte-level file comparison using `Buffer.compare` to detect if source and destination files are identical, skipping interactive review for unchanged files.
- Files: [smart-merge](API-SURFACE.md#smart-merge)

### Hook Profile
One of three modes controlling which hooks execute: **minimal** (lifecycle only), **standard** (most hooks), **strict** (all hooks including warnings). Set via `ECC_HOOK_PROFILE` env var.
- Files: [hook-flags](API-SURFACE.md#hook-flags), hooks/run-with-flags

### LCS Diff
Longest Common Subsequence algorithm used to compute line-level diffs between file versions. Falls back to a simpler algorithm for files with >1M line-pairs.
- Files: [smart-merge](API-SURFACE.md#smart-merge)

### Package Manager
One of npm, yarn, pnpm, or bun. Auto-detected from lock files, with fallback to `package.json` `packageManager` field.
- Files: [package-manager](API-SURFACE.md#package-manager)

### Run With Flags
Hook execution wrapper that checks the hook profile and disabled hook IDs before running a hook script. Gates all hook execution.
- Files: hooks/run-with-flags, [hook-flags](API-SURFACE.md#hook-flags)

### Smart Merge
AI-assisted file merging using `claude -p` CLI. Combines existing user content with incoming ECC content. Falls back to manual diff if Claude is unavailable.
- Files: [smart-merge](API-SURFACE.md#smart-merge)

See also: [Architecture](ARCHITECTURE.md) | [API Surface](API-SURFACE.md) | [Module Summaries](MODULE-SUMMARIES.md)
